data.name: ReportSubmitted
data.value: Report submitted. Thank you for helping keep Bishkek clean.

data.name: AppealSubmitted
data.value: Appeal submitted. An inspector will review it.

data.name: TooManyPhotos
data.value: You can attach at most {0} photos.

data.name: DisallowedImageType
data.value: {0}: only JPEG, PNG, or WEBP images are allowed.
